text:
Jute Shibari Rope 30'
The product page lists 30 feet of premium 6mm jute bondage rope finished with overhand knots. It says the ropes are conditioned, buttered, and ready to use. For dyed colors, the individual yarns are dyed before the rope is made so the color extends through the rope's core. A separate White Pearl option is offered without oil for customers who plan to dye it. The page links to separate care and maintenance instructions.
title: Jute Shibari Rope 30'
